/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/application/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/application/security.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/config/storage/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/infrastructure/storage/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/domain/user/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/domain/client/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/domain/protocol/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/repository/user/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/repository/client/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/repository/protocol/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/usecase/user/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/usecase/client/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/usecase/protocol/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/controller/user/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/controller/client/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nevrocardiomed.dir/controller/protocol/index.cpp.o -o nevrocardiomed   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libpqxx/7.10.5/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libpqxx/7.10.5/lib -lpqxx /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib
